title: [InstCombine] Fix poison safety of folding shufflevector into select

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary discusses parameter conditions but not icmp-derived scalar conditions that are guaranteed non-poison

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <4 x i32> @shuf_icmp_derived_condition(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y) {
#0:
  %cmp = icmp sgt i32 5, 3
  %sel = select i1 %cmp, <4 x i32> %y, <4 x i32> poison
  %shuf = shufflevector <4 x i32> %sel, <4 x i32> %x, 0, 1, 4, 5
  ret <4 x i32> %shuf
}
=>
define <4 x i32> @shuf_icmp_derived_condition(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y) {
#0:
  %shuf = shufflevector <4 x i32> %y, <4 x i32> %x, 0, 1, 4, 5
  ret <4 x i32> %shuf
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary examples only show integer vector element types (i8, i32), not floating-point vectors

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <4 x float> @shuf_float_vector_elements(<4 x float> %x, <4 x float> %y, i1 %cmp) {
#0:
  %sel = select i1 %cmp, <4 x float> %y, <4 x float> poison
  %shuf = shufflevector <4 x float> %sel, <4 x float> %x, 0, 5, 2, 7
  ret <4 x float> %shuf
}
=>
define <4 x float> @shuf_float_vector_elements(<4 x float> %x, <4 x float> %y, i1 %cmp) {
#0:
  %shuf = shufflevector <4 x float> %y, <4 x float> %x, 0, 5, 2, 7
  ret <4 x float> %shuf
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary doesn't mention compound boolean conditions (and/or) as valid non-poison condition sources

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <4 x i32> @shuf_condition_from_and(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y, i1 %c1, i1 %c2) {
#0:
  %and = and i1 %c1, %c2
  %sel = select i1 %and, <4 x i32> %y, <4 x i32> poison
  %shuf = shufflevector <4 x i32> %sel, <4 x i32> %x, 1, 0, 5, 4
  ret <4 x i32> %shuf
}
=>
define <4 x i32> @shuf_condition_from_and(<4 x i32> %x, <4 x i32> %y, i1 %c1, i1 %c2) {
#0:
  %shuf = shufflevector <4 x i32> %y, <4 x i32> %x, 1, 0, 5, 4
  ret <4 x i32> %shuf
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
